item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-15)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 54894 Trending skills: 18165 Hot skills: 3154 Top All Time: find-skills (557079) Top Trending: find-skills (11302) Top Hot: ai-seo (30)

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#47): qwen-image-2-pro
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 34801 Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Generate images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro via inference.sh CLI. Professional text rendering, fine-grained realism, enhanced semantic adherence. Ideal for posters, banners, and text-heavy designs. Triggers: qwen image pro, qwen-image-pro, qwen 2 pro, alibaba image pro, dashscope pro, professional text rendering

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#48): p-image
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 34793 Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Generate images with Pruna P-Image models via inference.sh CLI. Models: P-Image, P-Image-LoRA, P-Image-Edit, P-Image-Edit-LoRA. Capabilities: text-to-image, image editing, LoRA styles, multi-image compositing, fast inference. Pruna optimizes models for speed without quality loss. Triggers: pruna, p-image, pruna image, fast image generation, optimized flux, pruna ai, p image, fast ai image, economic image generation, cheap image generation

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#49): infsh-cli
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 34785 Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Run 150+ AI apps via inference.sh CLI - image generation, video creation, LLMs, search, 3D, Twitter automation. Models: FLUX, Veo, Gemini, Grok, Claude, Seedance, OmniHuman, Tavily, Exa, OpenRouter, and many more. Use when running AI apps, generating images/videos, calling LLMs, web search, or automating Twitter. Triggers: inference.sh, infsh, ai model, run ai, serverless ai, ai api, flux, veo, claude api, image generation, video generation, openrouter, tavily, exa search, twitter api, grok

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#1): ai-seo
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #1 Installs: 30 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to optimize content for AI search engines, get cited by LLMs, or appear in AI-generated answers. Also use when the user mentions 'AI SEO,' 'AEO,' 'GEO,' 'LLMO,' 'answer engine optimization,' 'generative engine optimization,' 'LLM optimization,' 'AI Overviews,' 'optimize for ChatGPT,' 'optimize for Perplexity,' 'AI citations,' 'AI visibility,' or 'zero-click search.' This skill covers content optimization for AI answer engines, monitoring AI visibility, and getting cited as a source. For traditional technical and on-page SEO audits, see seo-audit. For structured data implementation, see schema-markup.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#10): persona-exec-assistant
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #10 Installs: 21 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Manage an executive's schedule, inbox, and communications.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#11): gws-shared
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 21 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: gws CLI: Shared patterns for authentication, global flags, and output formatting.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#12): building-native-ui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #12 Installs: 30 Source: expo/skills Description: Complete guide for building beautiful apps with Expo Router. Covers fundamentals, styling, components, navigation, animations, patterns, and native tabs.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#13): gws-calendar-insert
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 24 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Calendar: Create a new event.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): gws-calendar
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 24 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Calendar: Manage calendars and events.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): expo-cicd-workflows
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 21 Source: expo/skills Description: Helps understand and write EAS workflow YAML files for Expo projects. Use this skill when the user asks about CI/CD or workflows in an Expo or EAS context, mentions .eas/workflows/, or wants help with EAS build pipelines or deployment automation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): use-dom
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 20 Source: expo/skills Description: Use Expo DOM components to run web code in a webview on native and as-is on web. Migrate web code to native incrementally.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): gws-tasks
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 19 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Tasks: Manage task lists and tasks.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#18): gws-meet
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #18 Installs: 18 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Manage Google Meet conferences.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#19): gws-chat
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #19 Installs: 16 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Chat: Manage Chat spaces and messages.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#2): upgrading-expo
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #2 Installs: 25 Source: expo/skills Description: Guidelines for upgrading Expo SDK versions and fixing dependency issues

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#20): gws-people
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #20 Installs: 16 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google People: Manage contacts and profiles.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#21): planning-with-files
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #21 Installs: 8 Source: othmanadi/planning-with-files Description: Implements Manus-style file-based planning for complex tasks. Creates task_plan.md, findings.md, and progress.md. Use when starting complex multi-step tasks, research projects, or any task requiring >5 tool calls. Now with automatic session recovery after /clear.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): find-skills
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 505 Source: vercel-labs/skills Description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): gws-gmail
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 28 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Gmail: Send, read, and manage email.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): competitor-alternatives
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 25 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to create competitor comparison or alternative pages for SEO and sales enablement. Also use when the user mentions 'alternative page,' 'vs page,' 'competitor comparison,' 'comparison page,' '[Product] vs [Product],' '[Product] alternative,' or 'competitive landing pages.' Covers four formats: singular alternative, plural alternatives, you vs competitor, and competitor vs competitor. Emphasizes deep research, modular content architecture, and varied section types beyond feature tables.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#26): expo-tailwind-setup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #26 Installs: 22 Source: expo/skills Description: Set up Tailwind CSS v4 in Expo with react-native-css and NativeWind v5 for universal styling

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): gws-gmail-watch
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 20 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Gmail: Watch for new emails and stream them as NDJSON.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): gws-gmail-reply-all
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 20 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Gmail: Reply-all to a message (handles threading automatically).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#3): expo-deployment
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #3 Installs: 24 Source: expo/skills Description: Deploying Expo apps to iOS App Store, Android Play Store, web hosting, and API routes

item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 18 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Read event data from a Google Sheets spreadsheet and create Google Calendar entries for each row.

item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 17 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Manage sales workflows — track deals, schedule calls, client comms.

item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 17 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Append a deal status update to a Google Sheets sales tracking spreadsheet.

item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 16 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Workspace Events: Renew/reactivate Workspace Events subscriptions.

item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 16 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Workspace Events: Subscribe to Workspace events and stream them as NDJSON.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): gws-events
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 16 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Subscribe to Google Workspace events.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#4): security-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #4 Installs: 15 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Implement security best practices for web applications and infrastructure. Use when securing APIs, preventing common vulnerabilities, or implementing security policies. Handles HTTPS, CORS, XSS, SQL Injection, CSRF, rate limiting, and OWASP Top 10.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): gws-modelarmor-create-template
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 16 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Model Armor: Create a new Model Armor template.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): gws-modelarmor
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 16 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Model Armor: Filter user-generated content for safety.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): gws-chat-send
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 14 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Chat: Send a message to a space.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): stripe-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 6 Source: stripe/ai Description: Best practices for building a Stripe integrations

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): flutter-theming-apps
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 6 Source: flutter/skills Description: Customizes the visual appearance of a Flutter app using the theming system. Use when defining global styles, colors, or typography for an application.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): social-content
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 26 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants help creating, scheduling, or optimizing social media content for LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, or other platforms. Also use when the user mentions 'LinkedIn post,' 'Twitter thread,' 'social media,' 'content calendar,' 'social scheduling,' 'engagement,' or 'viral content.' This skill covers content creation, repurposing, and platform-specific strategies.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): gws-drive
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 26 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Drive: Manage files, folders, and shared drives.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): gws-docs-write
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 24 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Docs: Append text to a document.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): firecrawl-browser
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 22 Source: firecrawl/cli Description: Cloud browser automation for pages requiring interaction — clicks, form fills, login, pagination, infinite scroll. Use this skill when the user needs to interact with a webpage, log into a site, click buttons, fill forms, navigate multi-step flows, handle pagination, or when regular scraping fails because content requires JavaScript interaction. Triggers on "click", "fill out the form", "log in to", "paginated", "infinite scroll", "interact with the page", or "scrape failed". Provides remote Chromium sessions with persistent profiles.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#5): gws-calendar-agenda
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #5 Installs: 24 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Calendar: Show upcoming events across all calendars.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): gws-sheets-append
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 22 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Sheets: Append a row to a spreadsheet.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#6): expo-api-routes
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #6 Installs: 23 Source: expo/skills Description: Guidelines for creating API routes in Expo Router with EAS Hosting

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#7): content-strategy
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #7 Installs: 31 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to plan a content strategy, decide what content to create, or figure out what topics to cover. Also use when the user mentions "content strategy," "what should I write about," "content ideas," "blog strategy," "topic clusters," or "content planning." For writing individual pieces, see copywriting. For SEO-specific audits, see seo-audit.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#8): expo-dev-client
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #8 Installs: 24 Source: expo/skills Description: Build and distribute Expo development clients locally or via TestFlight

item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #9 Installs: 24 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Gmail: Send an email.
